payload.answer: The new fact supersedes the prior memory that Sam works at Goldman. Current durable memory should reflect that Sam previously worked at Goldman, then left and joined Point72; the older employment status should not be presented as current.
citations: Existing memory: Sam works at Goldman.
New: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.

entity_resolution.reason: The new information refers to the same person, Sam, and updates an existing employment fact.

memory_cards.statement: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.

details: Detected direct contradiction on current employer.
Classified as supersession because the new fact explicitly indicates departure from the old employer and a new employer.
Prepared an update that preserves historical context without keeping the superseded fact as current.

repair_options: Mark 'Sam works at Goldman' as no longer current/superseded.
Store timeline-aware facts: Sam formerly worked at Goldman; Sam currently works at Point72.
If the system cannot represent time, replace the old current-employment fact with the new one and retain the transition note.
